title: xanthophyllum zeylanicum
intro: Xanthophyllum zeylanicum, also known as the Ceylon yellowwood, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum zeylanicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and promote overall well-being. The herbal preparations of Xanthophyllum zeylanicum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
